  • Class
    Description
    ClauseDispatcher
    This class decides in which order prover modules are invoked and manages derived and subsumed clauses.
    ClauseSimplifier
    This class is responsible for calling several simplifiers in a row on a clause.
    Dumper
    This class is responsible for dumping data structures.
    Dumper.Dumpable
     
    Dumper.DumpableDataStructure
     
    Dumper.DumpableObject
     
    ILevelController
    Interface for a level controller.
    IProverModule
    Base interface for a prover module.
    Level
    This class represents a level of the proof tree.
    ProverResult
    This class represents the result of the invocation of a prover.
    Tracer
    The tracer is responsible for keeping track of what formulas of a sequent are needed to get to a proof.
    Tracer.Pair
